description: Foundation-based multi-column grid layout providing a multicol wrapper, row container, and responsive column cells using named breakpoint span classes.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Three equal columns using medium-4 span inside a multicol wrapper

stories.name: TwoColumns
stories.description: Two equal columns using medium-6 span

stories.name: ContentWithSidebar
stories.description: Main content column large-8 alongside a sidebar column large-4

stories.name: MatchHeight
stories.description: Three columns with matchheight enabled to equalise card heights

props.children: Grid.Row matchHeight=true > three Grid.Col medium=4 columns

notes: This is a Foundation CSS grid system. GridCol accepts breakpoint-specific span numbers (small, medium, large) which are combined into class names like 'medium-4 columns'. The .block class found inside .multicol is a Drupal CMS internal wrapper and is intentionally not modelled as a subcomponent — it wraps arbitrary content and has no standalone UI meaning. Grid.Row and Grid.Col are attached as Grid.Row and Grid.Col on the main Grid component. Pure layout container — accepts arbitrary children.
